---
id: get-cluster-usage-metrics
title: "Get cluster usage metrics"
description: "Returns the usage metrics for a cluster. The provided token is forwarded to the Orchestration Cluster API of the target cluster, so it must additionally include the read:* permission for the orchestration-api audience."
sidebar_label: "Get cluster usage metrics"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/hub-api-sm/specifications/hub-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get cluster usage metrics"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/clusters/usage-metrics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Returns the usage metrics for a cluster. The provided token is forwarded to the Orchestration Cluster API of the target cluster, so it must additionally include the read:\* permission for the orchestration-api audience.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "id",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "The ID of the cluster.",
      schema: { type: "string" },
    },
    {
      name: "start",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "The start of the time range (epoch milliseconds).",
      schema: { type: "integer", format: "int64" },
    },
    {
      name: "end",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "The end of the time range (epoch milliseconds).",
      schema: { type: "integer", format: "int64" },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "The usage metrics were retrieved successfully.",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: [
              "id",
              "processInstances",
              "decisionInstances",
              "taskUsers",
              "activeTenants",
            ],
            properties: {
              id: { description: "The cluster ID.", type: "string" },
              processInstances: {
                description: "Process instance metrics.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    required: ["total"],
                    properties: {
                      total: {
                        description: "The total count.",
                        type: "integer",
                        format: "int64",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "MetricTotal",
                  },
                ],
              },
              decisionInstances: {
                description: "Decision instance metrics.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    required: ["total"],
                    properties: {
                      total: {
                        description: "The total count.",
                        type: "integer",
                        format: "int64",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "MetricTotal",
                  },
                ],
              },
              taskUsers: {
                description: "Task user metrics.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    required: ["total", "assignees"],
                    properties: {
                      total: {
                        description: "The total count.",
                        type: "integer",
                        format: "int64",
                      },
                      assignees: {
                        description: "The list of assignee identifiers.",
                        type: "array",
                        items: { type: "string" },
                      },
                    },
                    title: "TaskUsersMetric",
                  },
                ],
              },
              activeTenants: {
                description: "Active tenant metrics.",
                nullable: true,
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    required: ["total"],
                    properties: {
                      total: {
                        description: "The total count.",
                        type: "integer",
                        format: "int64",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "MetricTotal",
                  },
                ],
              },
            },
            title: "UsageMetricsResult",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "The request lacks valid authentication credentials.",
      headers: { "WWW-Authenticate": { schema: { type: "string" } } },
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Unauthorized",
            status: 401,
            detail:
              "The supplied authentication is not authorized to access this resource.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "403": {
      description: "Forbidden. The request is not allowed.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Forbidden",
            status: 403,
            detail:
              "Operation not allowed. Ensure your API credentials have the required permissions.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files/file-789-xyz",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "The requested resource was not found.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Not Found",
            status: 404,
            detail: "The requested resource was not found.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files/file-789-xyz",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Internal Server Error",
            status: 500,
            detail:
              "An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
